message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column sort/argsort/diff/duplicated/between parity (frankenpandas-a1d1)

Five Column methods and a shared compare_scalars_na_last helper:

- sort_values(ascending) — stable sort; nulls always at the end
  (pandas na_position='last' default).
- argsort() — positions that sort the column ascending; composes with
  take() to reproduce sort_values(true).
- diff(periods) — lag subtraction; negative periods compute the
  forward lag. Non-numeric inputs return TypeError. Result dtype is
  always Float64.
- duplicated() — bool column flagging all-but-first occurrences;
  treats every null position as the same bucket (pandas convention).
- between(lower, upper, inclusive) — inclusive or strictly-open
  membership test; missing inputs map to false.

Co-lands frankenpandas-q11d (argsort), t643 (diff), bkqo (duplicated),
73d0 (between).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
